title: OneTap
description: Stop wasting your mouse durability by spam clicking skeletons and zombies, just install this mod to instantly eliminate anything
body: Stop wasting your mouse durability by spam clicking skeletons and zombies, just install this mod to instantly eliminate anything, This mod mainly focuses on saving your mouse durability because so many little timmys spam click to kill zombies so if you install this mod your mouse will be safe and protected from breaking. All the mod dose is one tap everything
